models.name: stg_acquisition__affiliate_actions
models.description: Staging model for Impact Radius affiliate actions — incremental by _fivetran_synced

decision_log.decision: hourly_rollup pattern — 1 new incremental staging model following campaign_day_agg template
decision_log.rationale: campaign_day_agg uses hourly staging with daily rollup. Affiliate actions arrive frequently enough for hourly incremental. Single model since there's no existing aggregate to modify.
alternatives_considered: multi_source_union — rejected, no existing agg to extend
standard — rejected, hourly source needs incremental
